body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus` **Service directory:** `sdk/servicebus/Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus/` **Triggered by:** PR #58447 (commit f3c8da9) by @jsquire ## What Changed PR #58447 centralized Service Bus samples by moving three standalone sample projects out of `sdk/servicebus/` into the repository-level `samples/servicebus/` directory: - `sdk/servicebus/.../DeadLetterQueue/` → `samples/servicebus/dead-letter-queue/` - `sdk/servicebus/.../TopicFilters/` → `samples/servicebus/topic-filters/` - `sdk/servicebus/.../PluginSample/` → `samples/servicebus/plugin-sample/` ## Gaps Found - The `sdk/servicebus/Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus/samples/README.md` sample index was **not updated** to link to the three newly centralized samples. These samples are now invisible to users browsing the in-package samples index. - `samples/servicebus/dead-letter-queue/README.md` still says **"Install [.NET 5.0]"** — this is outdated; should reference .NET 10 (consistent with the IoT Hub sample that was updated in the same PR). - `samples/servicebus/topic-filters/README.md` still says **"Install [.NET 5.0]"** — same issue.
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Modify files #### File 1: `sdk/servicebus/Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus/samples/README.md` **Edit** — append the following three entries to the end of the sample list (after the existing `Sample20_PerformancePatterns.md` link): ```markdown ## Application samples These samples demonstrate end-to-end application scenarios using Azure Service Bus. - [Dead-letter queues](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/samples/servicebus/dead-letter-queue/README.md) - [Topic filters](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/samples/servicebus/topic-filters/README.md) - [Plugin extensibility pattern](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/samples/servicebus/plugin-sample/README.md) ``` #### File 2: `samples/servicebus/dead-letter-queue/README.md` **Edit** — replace the stale .NET version reference. Change: ```markdown 1. Install [.NET 5.0](https://dot.net) or newer. ``` to: ```markdown 1. Install [.NET 10.0](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download) or newer. ``` #### File 3: `samples/servicebus/topic-filters/README.md` **Edit** — replace the stale .NET version reference. Change: ```markdown 1. Install [.NET 5.0](https://dot.net) or newer. ``` to: ```markdown 1. Install [.NET 10.0](https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download) or newer. ``` ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets No new code snippets are required for these changes. The samples are standalone projects and are already complete; only the index README links and the version strings need updating. ### Step 3: Verify README structure The existing `sdk/servicebus/Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus/samples/README.md` is already a flat link list — no required section structure applies. The three new standalone sample READMEs (`dead-letter-queue`, `topic-filters`, `plugin-sample`) each have the correct front-matter and sections. No restructuring is needed; only the link additions and version string fixes described above. ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order: 1. `dotnet build sdk/servicebus/Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/servicebus/Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `dotnet build samples/servicebus/dead-letter-queue/` 4. `dotnet build samples/servicebus/topic-filters/` 5. `dotnet build samples/servicebus/plugin-sample/` No snippet regeneration or API export is required as no public types or members were added.
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
title: [Service Bus] Docs: Update samples README and fix stale .NET version references after sample centralization
